user.title: Cachix – Global Caché Setup
user.description: Choose how to add your Global Caché device.

discover.title: Discovered Devices
discover.description: Select a Global Caché device found on your network.

manual.title: Manual Configuration
manual.description: Enter the IP address and port of your Global Caché device.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Verify the IP address and that the device is powered on.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
error.no_devices_found: No Global Caché devices were found on your network. Try manual entry instead.
error.invalid_host: The host address is not valid.

init.title: Cachix – Command Manager
init.description: Manage commands and settings for this Global Caché device.

add_command.title: What type of command?
add_command.description: Choose the command type. You'll get a form tailored for that type next.

add_ir.title: Add IR Command
add_ir.description: Fill in the fields below. You only need to paste the IR pulse data — the integration builds the full TCP command for you automatically.

data.name: Command Name (e.g. TV Power, Volume Up)
data.repeat: Repeat Count (how many times to send)

add_relay.title: Add Relay Command
add_relay.description: Control a relay port on the device.

data.name: Command Name (e.g. Garage Door, Screen Down)

add_serial.title: Add Serial Command
add_serial.description: Send data through an RS-232 serial port.

add_raw.title: Add Raw TCP Command
add_raw.description: For advanced users. Type the exact TCP command string to send to the device.

edit_command.title: Edit Command
edit_command.description: Select the command you want to edit.

edit_ir.title: Edit IR Command
edit_ir.description: Modify the IR command parameters below.

edit_relay.title: Edit Relay Command
edit_relay.description: Modify the relay command parameters below.

edit_serial.title: Edit Serial Command
edit_serial.description: Modify the serial command parameters below.

edit_raw.title: Edit Raw TCP Command
edit_raw.description: Modify the raw TCP command below.

remove_command.title: Remove Command
remove_command.description: Select the command to remove. The associated button entity will be deleted.

settings.title: General Settings
settings.description: Configure polling interval and connection parameters.

abort.no_commands: No commands have been configured yet. Add one first.
abort.command_not_found: The selected command could not be found.

device_not_found.message: No Cachix device found for the given ID.

command_not_found.message: The named command does not exist on this device.
